drugs.name: barnidipine
drugs.citation: Teramura et al.,Xenobiotica,27,885,1997
broad_region_annotations:
A ring reaarangment happened, starting at site 13 and ends at site 1.
Metabolites for CYP2C8 can not be confirmed. It may not be a substrate for CYP2C8.
<20,11;Cleavage;R2> should be <5,11;Hydrolysis> and requires hydrolase, hence it's removed.
